summary: Low‑output soundboard recording that sounds fine at home but is barely audible on the road; reviewers enjoyed the show despite limited technical detail.
review: Both reviewers give high marks, noting an enjoyable evening and a personal connection to the October 20 1990 performance. The main criticism concerns the recording’s very low level – it sounds nice when cranked up at home but is almost inaudible in a car. No specific musical highlights or set‑list comments were provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Two positive reviews with high star ratings, but limited detail on performance; recording quality is noted as low output, pulling the overall rating down slightly.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Overall level is very low – quiet on car speakers and EQ barely registers. Sound is clear when volume is boosted at home, but lacks sufficient output for portable listening.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers simply note the show was enjoyable and memorable personally.
